use_cases: Landing page hero background with interactive mouse-responsive dot grid
Portfolio or creative site background with animated visual effects
SaaS product hero section with engaging visual element
Interactive loading screen or splash page background
Product demo or showcase background with dynamic visual interest
ai_summary: An interactive canvas-based dot grid component that responds to mouse proximity by illuminating dots and drawing connection lines between nearby dots. Features dynamic hue shifting over time, creating a colorful, engaging visual effect suitable for hero sections, backgrounds, or landing pages. The dots use HSL color values with configurable brightness based on distance from the cursor.
